_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Evaluate reporting (e.g., BDA, MOEs, MISREP) in order to support commanders decisions.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-001 (LS, cosine: 0.514), RC-T-004 (RC, cosine: 0.506).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.499). Shared vocabulary: [reporting]. DCWF-only terms [bda, commanders, decisions, evaluate, misrep, moes] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.858, R=0.878). R exceeds P by 0.020 — the WIDAI KSA's 17 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 12 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:17.1%, N:77.9%, C:5.0%). No dominant classification for "Evaluate reporting (e.g., BDA, MOEs, MISREP) in order to support commanders deci" vs "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 ≈ STS 0.499 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [reporting] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [reporting]. DCWF-only: [bda, commanders, decisions, evaluate, misrep, moes]. WIDAI-only: [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing].
